barter.title: Barter Opportunities
barter.description: Multi-party exchange chains based on your offers and requests

promo.title: Barter Exchange
promo.tagline: Trade without money - create offers & requests to find matches
promo.description: Parahub finds multi-party exchange chains where everyone gets what they want without using money.
promo.how_it_works: Create offers (what you have) and requests (what you need). Our algorithm finds 2-way, 3-way and more complex exchanges automatically.

empty.title: No exchange opportunities yet
empty.description: Create listings (what you offer and what you want) to find barter partners

barter.landing_meta: Exchange goods and services without money. The system finds multilateral exchange chains automatically. Free and open-source.
barter.landing_hero_title: Barter exchange — no money, no middlemen
barter.landing_hero_subtitle: Post what you have and what you need. The algorithm finds exchange chains of 2 to 5 participants — even when direct swap isn't possible.
barter.landing_problem_1: Trading without money seems impossible when nobody wants what we have to offer directly
barter.landing_problem_2: Finding multilateral exchange chains manually is impractical
barter.landing_problem_3: No trust between strangers to exchange without a middleman
barter.landing_feature_1_desc: The algorithm finds cycles of 2 to 7 participants where everyone gets what they want — even without direct swap
barter.landing_feature_2_desc: Neo4j graph engine analyzes all offers and requests to find possible matches
barter.landing_feature_3_desc: Reputation built through in-person verifications. No blind trust — every participant is verified
barter.landing_feature_4_desc: When a chain is found, an encrypted Matrix chat with all participants is created automatically
barter.landing_feature_5_desc: Works across cities and countries — anyone on the platform can participate in exchange chains
barter.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no commissions, no ads. Civic infrastructure, not a product
barter.landing_how_1: Post what you offer and what you're looking for on the market
barter.landing_how_2: The algorithm analyzes all offers and finds possible exchange chains
barter.landing_how_3: All participants approve and coordinate the exchange via encrypted chat
barter.landing_free_desc: The economy doesn't need money to work. Parahub proves that direct exchange is possible at scale.

errors.chat_failed: Failed to create chat room. Please try again.

diagnosis.explainer: A chain closes only when your request matches someone's offer — and your offer matches their request. The more you list on both sides, the higher your odds.
diagnosis.no_offers_hint: You have nothing on offer yet.
diagnosis.no_requests_hint: You haven't said what you're looking for — barter can't close without it.

create_nudge.heading: What do you want in return?
create_nudge.explainer: Tell us what you're looking for — the system will find an exchange chain. Without a request, your offer can't take part in barter.
create_nudge.title_placeholder: e.g. a laptop, an hour of design work, tomatoes
